ps4_thresholds_applied: A point system is used to tally probands (Antithrombin deficiency PP4/PS4 Rule Specification Guidance, PS4 section): 1 point is awarded for each proband with an antithrombin activity level of < 0.8 IU/mL (or below the lab's reference range) confirmed on repeated independent samples; 1 point is awarded for each proband with an antithrombin activity level of < 0.8 IU/mL without repeat confirmation but with a family history of antithrombin activity levels < 0.8 IU/mL; 1 point is awarded for each proband with an abnormal crossed immunoelectrophoresis assay demonstrating decreased antithrombin function; 0.5 points are awarded for each proband with an antithrombin activity level of < 0.8 IU/mL without confirmation of repeated independent samples tested. Strength levels: PS4_Supporting: 1 point; PS4_Moderate: 2-3 points; PS4 (Strong): 4-7 points; PS4_VeryStrong: 8 or more points
